insight: You've taken the first step by completing your initial session, and now it's time to build on that momentum by focusing on specific areas where you can improve, even if it's just a small increment from your current 10% average score. Given that you've already started with a 1-day streak, try to maintain that daily habit and aim to increase your score by just 1-2% in the next session, which can help you establish a sense of progress and motivation to continue learning.

alerts.msg: Last score was 10%. Agent recommends reviewing before continuing.

recommendation.msg: Schedule a review session before proceeding to new material.
